_schema: entities.<id> = { name, type: 'quest'|'equip'|'use'|'etc'|'setup', use: string, soldBy: ['npc:<id>'] }

dark_marble.name: Dark Marble
dark_marble.use: 30 requeridos en el test del 2nd job de thief ([[quest:assassin_second_job]], [[quest:bandit_second_job]]).

black_crystal.name: Black Crystal
black_crystal.use: 30 requeridos en el test del 2nd job de warrior/pirate ([[quest:fighter_second_job]], [[quest:brawler_second_job]]).

black_charm.name: Black Charm
black_charm.use: 30 requeridos en el test del 2nd job de mage ([[quest:fp_mage_second_job]]). También usado en 3rd job Holy Stone quiz.

black_gem.name: Black Gem
black_gem.use: 30 requeridos en el test del 2nd job de bowman ([[quest:hunter_second_job]]).

fire_ore.name: Fire Ore
fire_ore.use: 30 requeridos en Stage 1 de [[quest:zakum_prequest]] — drops en [[map:dead_mine]].

breath_of_fire.name: Breath of Fire
breath_of_fire.use: Se recoge al final del jump quest de [[map:dead_mine_jq]] (Stage 1 de [[quest:zakum_prequest]]).

breath_of_lava.name: Breath of Lava
breath_of_lava.use: Recompensa del Stage 2 de [[quest:zakum_prequest]] (30 Gold Teeth de [[mob:miner_zombie]]).

eye_of_fire.name: Eye of Fire
eye_of_fire.use: Ticket de entrada al [[map:zakums_altar]] — en Royals cada entrada consume uno.

zombies_lost_gold_tooth.name: Zombie's Lost Gold Tooth
zombies_lost_gold_tooth.use: Hand in 30 during Stage 2 of [[quest:zakum_prequest]] together with the [[item:paper_of_fire]]. Dropped by [[mob:miner_zombie]].

heroic_star.name: Heroic Star
heroic_star.use: Requerido para el 4th job. Drop de [[mob:manon]]; tradeable en Royals.

heroic_pentagon.name: Heroic Pentagon
heroic_pentagon.use: Requerido para el 4th job. Drop de [[mob:griffey]]; tradeable en Royals.

dragon_moss.name: Dragon Moss
dragon_moss.use: 20 requeridos en [[quest:horntail_prequest]] — drop de [[mob:mossy_snail]] en [[map:minar_forest]]. Tradeable en Royals.

dragon_wood.name: Dragon Wood
dragon_wood.use: 20 requeridos en [[quest:horntail_prequest]] — drop de [[mob:dual_birk]] en [[map:minar_forest]]. Tradeable en Royals.

horntail_cave_pass.name: Horntail Cave Pass
horntail_cave_pass.use: Ticket de entrada a [[map:horntails_cave]] — recompensa de [[quest:horntail_prequest]].

papulatus_ticket.name: Papulatus Ticket
papulatus_ticket.use: Ticket de entrada a [[map:papulatus_altar]] — recompensa de [[quest:papulatus_prequest]].

squishy_liquid.name: Squishy Liquid
squishy_liquid.use: 50 requeridos en [[quest:pink_bean_prequest]] — drops de mobs en [[map:mushroom_shrine]].

pink_bean_ticket.name: Pink Bean Ticket
pink_bean_ticket.use: Ticket de entrada a [[map:pink_bean_altar]] — recompensa de [[quest:pink_bean_prequest]].
